body: Looks like we need thermal compensation — every sample reads raw with no temperature correction. Let me try a lookup-table offset on the probe driver.
Agree. Once the offset lands let's re-run the field test against the reference gravimetric readings.
Looks great — couple of nits inline. Approving once the queue gauge in #143 lands.
Marked draft until we wire the valve retry config (blocked by #89).
Repro steps in the linked screen recording. Console logs attached.
Pushed the lookup-table offset to a branch. Drift is down to ~2% in the bench rig now.
Queue-depth gauge looks good in the dashboard preview. Can we expose it over the metrics endpoint too?
Yes, wiring it into the metrics exporter next. Will tag you for review.
Docs for the hydrosense_adapter flag would help growers. Happy to draft a short guide.
Retry-on-timeout config landed on the bench. Reboot test no longer drops commands.
Dual-protocol scaffold reads clean. Modbus path needs a CRC check before we merge.
Reproduced on Safari 17.4. Guarding the heatmap hook against empty readings now.
Nice catch. Add a regression test with an empty readings payload.
The Andalucia import shifted the degree-day baseline. Looks like a timezone offset on the trap timestamps.
Confirmed, the trap CSV is in local time not UTC. Normalizing on ingest.
Field test against the gravimetric reference is scheduled for next week. Will post numbers.
Onboarding guide reads well. Added two screenshots for the sensor pairing step.
CRC check added. Field integration test pending on the Baena station.
Approved. Merge once the queue gauge in #143 is in.
After the timezone fix the Subbetica forecast lines up with the trap counts again.
Metrics endpoint exposes the queue gauge now. Grafana panel attached.
